ast.name: log
ast.source: load Lunar Calendar
ast.target: 加载农历

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 日历生成的日记保存的路径。默认为`日历`
ast.target: 日历生成的日记保存的路径。默认为`日历`

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 参考moment的时间格式。默认为`YYYY-MM-DD`
ast.target: 参考moment的时间格式。默认为`YYYY-MM-DD`

ast.name: setName
ast.source: 日记保存路径
ast.target: 日记保存路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: 日记名保存格式
ast.target: 日记名保存格式

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: 输入要保存的日记路径
ast.target: 输入要保存的日记路径

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: 时间格式
ast.target: 时间格式

ast.name: warn
ast.source: cannot run an inactive effect scope.
ast.target: 无法运行非活动的 effect scope。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Write operation failed: computed value is readonly
ast.target: 写入操作失败：computed 值为只读

ast.name: warn
ast.source: provide() can only be used inside setup().
ast.target: provide() 只能在 setup() 内使用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: inject() can only be used inside setup() or functional components.
ast.target: inject() 只能在 setup() 或函数式组件内部使用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: \`watch(fn, options?)\` signature has been moved to a separate API. Use \`watchEffect(fn, options?)\` instead. \`watch\` now only supports \`watch(source, cb, options?) signature.
ast.target: \`watch(fn, options?)\` 签名已移动到单独的 API。请改用 \`watchEffect(fn, options?)\`。\`watch\` 现在仅支持 \`watch(source, cb, options?)\` 签名。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: watch() "immediate" option is only respected when using the watch(source, callback, options?) signature.
ast.target: watch() 的 "immediate" 选项仅在使用 watch(source, callback, options?) 签名时生效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: watch() "deep" option is only respected when using the watch(source, callback, options?) signature.
ast.target: watch() 的 "deep" 选项仅在使用 watch(source, callback, options?) 签名时生效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid watch source:
ast.target: 无效的 watch 源：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: A watch source can only be a getter/effect function, a ref, a reactive object, or an array of these types.
ast.target: watch 源只能是 getter/effect 函数、ref、响应式对象，或由这些类型组成的数组。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The data option must be a function. Plain object usage is no longer supported.
ast.target: data 选项必须是函数。不再支持使用普通对象。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: data() returned a Promise - note data() cannot be async; If you intend to perform data fetching before component renders, use async setup() + <Suspense>.
ast.target: data() 返回了 Promise —— 注意 data() 不能是 async；如果你想在组件渲染前进行数据获取，请使用 async setup() + <Suspense>。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: props must be strings when using array syntax.
ast.target: 使用数组语法时，props 必须是字符串。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: invalid props options
ast.target: 无效的 props 选项

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Non-function value encountered for default slot. Prefer function slots for better performance.
ast.target: 默认插槽遇到非函数值。为获得更好的性能，优先使用函数插槽。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: app.config cannot be replaced. Modify individual options instead.
ast.target: app.config 不能被替换。请改为修改各个选项。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: A plugin must either be a function or an object with an "install" function.
ast.target: 插件必须是函数或包含 "install" 函数的对象。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Mixins are only available in builds supporting Options API
ast.target: Mixins 仅在支持 Options API 的构建版本中可用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
There is already an app instance mounted on the host container.
 If you want to mount another app on the same host container, you need to unmount the previous app by calling \`app.unmount()\` first.
ast.target:
宿主容器上已挂载一个应用实例。
 如果你想在同一宿主容器上挂载另一个应用，需要先调用 \`app.unmount()\` 卸载之前的应用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot unmount an app that is not mounted.
ast.target: 无法卸载未挂载的应用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Missing ref owner context. ref cannot be used on hoisted vnodes. A vnode with ref must be created inside the render function.
ast.target: 缺少 ref 所有者上下文。ref 不能用于提升的 vnode。带有 ref 的 vnode 必须在渲染函数中创建。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid VNode type:
ast.target: 无效的 VNode 类型：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Duplicate keys found during update:
ast.target: 更新过程中发现重复的 key：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Make sure keys are unique.
ast.target: 请确保 key 是唯一的。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: VNode created with invalid key (NaN). VNode type:
ast.target: 使用无效的 key (NaN) 创建了 VNode。VNode 类型：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Vue received a Component which was made a reactive object. This can lead to unnecessary performance overhead, and should be avoided by marking the component with \`markRaw\` or using \`shallowRef\` instead of \`ref\`.
ast.target: Vue 接收到一个被做成响应式对象的组件。这会导致不必要的性能开销，应通过用 \`markRaw\` 标记该组件，或使用 \`shallowRef\` 替代 \`ref\` 来避免。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Component that was made reactive:
ast.target: 被做成响应式的组件：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: "compilerOptions" is only supported when using a build of Vue that includes the runtime compiler. Since you are using a runtime-only build, the options should be passed via your build tool config instead.
ast.target: 只有在使用包含运行时编译器的 Vue 构建版本时才支持 "compilerOptions"。由于你使用的是仅运行时版本，应通过构建工具配置传递这些选项。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setup() should not return VNodes directly - return a render function instead.
ast.target: setup() 不应直接返回 VNode——请改为返回渲染函数。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setupContext.attrs is readonly.
ast.target: setupContext.attrs 是只读的。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: expose() should be called only once per setup().
ast.target: expose() 在每次 setup() 中只能调用一次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: mounting on a ShadowRoot with \`{mode: "closed"}\` may lead to unpredictable bugs
ast.target: 在带有 \`{mode: "closed"}\` 的 ShadowRoot 上挂载可能导致不可预测的 bug
